allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u nihongo -p123456 nihongoflow -e "SELECT l.id, l.course_id, l.title, l.video_url FROM lessons l ORDER BY l.course_id, l.\\`order\\`;")
